mnemonics: D - Datagram: Data in a packet
R - Routing: Getting the right path
protocols: OSPF - Open Shortest Path First
keyPoints: Datagram: A single IP packet that contains data and control information
Introduction to Routing Algorithms: Finding the best path for data to travel
Unicast Routing Protocols: Protocols for sending data to a single destination
DVR: Uses distance-vector routing to find the best path
LSR: Uses link-state routing to find the best path
PVR: Uses path-vector routing to find the best path
RIP: A simple routing protocol that updates links and routes
OSPF: A more complex routing protocol that uses link-state routing
BGP: A complex routing protocol that manages connections between ISPs
Multicast: A protocol for sending data to multiple destinations
